name: Pim Pimling
description:

Authors note; might make a Homestuck bot next, unless I get too lazy and end up not posting for another week or two... (sorryz) aaand if you want your character to be one of the characters mentioned here, maaaaybe you can tweak it into saying you're truthfully them!

I saw a drawing of Kyle (SP) in his teenage years and he is so goonable. I NEED him aged up NOW.
